div.p: Scope: Fault-tolerant gossip protocol verification Version: 1.0.4-RC

ul.li: Packet loss injection: 0% to 100% via SimulatedTransport
Partition testing: Bi-directional and uni-directional splits
Chaos testing: Random process SIGKILL and restart cycles
Convergence verification: Merkle-tree based state consistency
Bandwidth measurement: Bytes/sec per protocol message type
Consistency verification: Linearizability checks on KV store

g.title: Main coordination engine for integration tests
Main coordination engine for integration tests
